questions.question: By what age should Adelina be able to hold her head upright when held in a sitting position?
questions.answer: A) By 3 months

questions.question: By 6 months, Adelina should be able to _____.
questions.answer: C) Roll from her tummy to her back
options: C) Roll from her tummy to her back
D) Crawl on hands and knees

questions.question: True or False: By 9 months, Adelina should be able to sit independently and play with toys.
questions.answer: True

questions.question: By what age should Adelina start babbling with consonant sounds like 'da, da'?
questions.answer: B) By 6 months

questions.question: By 3 months, Adelina should be able to _____.
questions.answer: B) Coo, smile, and turn her head toward your voice
options: B) Coo, smile, and turn her head toward your voice
C) Respond to her own name
D) Use gestures like raising her arms to be picked up

questions.question: Which comes first?
questions.answer: A) Bouncing on her legs when held standing
options: A) Bouncing on her legs when held standing

questions.question: By what age should Adelina be able to stand with support and start taking side steps along furniture?
questions.answer: C) By 9 months

questions.question: True or False: By 12 months, Adelina may be able to walk independently.
questions.answer: True — though the full range is 10–15 months

questions.question: By 9 months, Adelina should be able to _____.
questions.answer: D) Shake her head 'no' and raise her arms to be picked up
options: A) Say a few real words
B) Coo and make different cries for hunger vs. pain
D) Shake her head 'no' and raise her arms to be picked up

questions.question: By what age should Adelina be able to lift her head and chest off the ground and reach for a toy?
questions.answer: B) By 6 months

questions.question: Which comes first?
questions.answer: A) Responding to her own name
options: A) Responding to her own name

questions.question: True or False: By 3 months, Adelina should already have different cries for pain, hunger, and tiredness.
questions.answer: True

questions.question: By 12 months, Adelina should be able to _____.
questions.answer: C) Follow a simple instruction like 'come here'
options: A) Babble with varied syllables like 'bababba'
B) Take turns vocalizing back and forth with you
C) Follow a simple instruction like 'come here'
D) React to sudden loud noises

questions.question: By what age should Adelina be able to get herself from lying down into a sitting position on her own?
questions.answer: C) By 9 months

questions.question: By 6 months, Adelina should be able to _____.
questions.answer: B) Take turns 'talking' back and forth with you
options: A) Point at things she wants
B) Take turns 'talking' back and forth with you

questions.question: Which comes first?
questions.answer: B) Reaching and batting at toys
options: B) Reaching and batting at toys

questions.question: By what age should Adelina be able to pull herself up to standing and cruise along furniture?
questions.answer: D) By 12 months

questions.question: True or False: By 9 months, Adelina should be able to look at a familiar object when you name it.
questions.answer: True

questions.question: By 3 months, Adelina should be able to _____.
questions.answer: A) Lift her head 45–90 degrees when lying on her tummy
options: A) Lift her head 45–90 degrees when lying on her tummy
B) Roll from tummy to back
C) Sit with hands for support
D) Bounce on her legs when held standing

questions.question: By what age should Adelina be able to pick up small objects using just her thumb and index finger?
questions.answer: D) By 12 months

questions.question: Which comes first?
questions.answer: A) Babbling with repeated syllables like 'bababba'
options: A) Babbling with repeated syllables like 'bababba'
B) Saying a few real words

questions.question: True or False: By 6 months, Adelina should be able to sit completely independently without any support.
questions.answer: False — sitting independently comes by 9 months. At 6 months she uses her hands for support.

questions.question: By what age should Adelina be able to point with her index finger?
questions.answer: C) By 9 months

questions.question: By 12 months, Adelina should be able to _____.
questions.answer: D) Move freely between lying, sitting, and standing on her own
options: B) Stand briefly with furniture support
C) Walk only when both hands are held
D) Move freely between lying, sitting, and standing on her own
